name: school-management-system
description: MEAN stack school management system with RBAC for Admin, Teacher, and Student roles.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run start"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
